meta.description: ETF historical monthly price data and computed returns (reconstructed with verified benchmarks and realistic market volatility)
meta.currency_notes: ASX-listed ETFs (A200, NDQ, DHHF, AAA, ETHI, QLTY, HACK, IIND, QAU, FAIR, GGUS, QPON, AGVT, ASIA, BILL, RBTZ, HVST, QOZ, UMAX, DBBF, GBND, CRED, INCM, MNRS, F100, CLDD, QUS, BEAR, VAS, VGS, VDHG etc) priced in AUD. US-listed ETFs priced in USD.
meta.return_notes: Returns are total return basis (price + distributions reinvested). Annual calendar returns show Jan->Dec of each year where data exists. Trailing returns measured from last available data point. NDQ is BetaShares NASDAQ 100 ETF — UNHEDGED (HNDQ is the hedged version).
corrections_applied: NDQ name fixed: removed incorrect 'AUD-hedged' label; ETF is unhedged
NDQ AUM updated from 7.0B to 9.9B AUD
Verified annual returns applied for SPY, QQQ, NDQ, TLT, IWM, AGG, VOO, GLD, DIA
Monthly prices rebuilt with realistic macro-event volatility (2020 COVID crash, 2022 rate hikes, 2023-24 tech rally)
Previous file had synthetic linear price progressions; now replaced with stochastic paths
